quality.rationale: 超曲面积分元在参数变换下的不变性证明，涉及雅可比链式法则与定向约定，结构清晰且可直接迁移至任意维度流形的微分形式积分

origin.question: Problem 8.9. Show that the integral $\int_{\mathbf{S}} \mathbf{F}^{\mu} \mathrm{d}^{3}\Sigma_{\mu}$ , where $\mathbf{F}^{\mu}$ is some vector field and $\mathbf{S}$ is some oriented 3-dimensional hypersurface in spacetime, is independent of the parametrization $\mathbf{x}^{\mu} = \mathbf{x}^{\mu}(\mathbf{a}, \mathbf{b}, \mathbf{c})$ used to describe $\mathbf{S}$ . [See Problem 3.30 for the definition of $\mathrm{d}^{3}\Sigma_{\mu}$ .]
origin.answer: The integral $\int_{\mathbf{S}} \mathbf{F}^{\mu} \mathrm{d}^{3}\Sigma_{\mu}$ is independent of the parametrization used to describe $\mathbf{S}$.
